data.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: AC verification complete ✓ - All ACs pass: no inline merge detection, sources merge-state.sh, test-merge-aware-diff.sh 13/13, test-merge-state.sh 27/27. Discovered: pre-commit-ticket-gate.sh has inline MERGE_HEAD detection without sourcing merge-state.sh → created bug 2829-08b6.
